pr.title: Title: AtomLogic v3.2 Universal SOTA - 1.15 BPB Target

output.summary: Shares one Universal Transformer block over 20 iterations with value-only MoE binary-mask experts, VeRA zero-leakage TTT, and Muon optimizer.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Standard training regimen; no validation-shard-only training is described.
techniques: Shared Universal Transformer block iterated 20 times
Value-only MoE with binary masks on shared weights
VeRA zero-leakage TTT plus Muon optimizer for NF4 tied embeddings
